mapper.select: SELECT AVG(faithfulness_score) AS allFaith, AVG(accuracy_score) AS allAcc, AVG(job_reflection_score) AS allJob, AVG(relevance_score) AS allRel, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN faithfulness_score END) AS curFaith, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN accuracy_score END) AS curAcc, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN job_reflection_score END) AS curJob, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN relevance_score END) AS curRel, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN faithfulness_score END) AS prevFaith, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN accuracy_score END) AS prevAcc, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN job_reflection_score END) AS prevJob, AVG(CASE WHEN created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) THEN relevance_score END) AS prevRel FROM sys_ai_report_quality

SELECT CONCAT('RPT-', r.report_id) AS reportId, p.persona_code AS personaCode, ROUND(sv.avgr, 1) AS star, r.response_time_ms AS ms, q.quality_issue AS issue FROM sys_ai_report r JOIN (SELECT report_id, AVG(rating) AS avgr FROM sys_ai_report_survey GROUP BY report_id) sv ON sv.report_id = r.report_id LEFT JOIN sys_ai_report_quality q ON q.report_id = r.report_id JOIN sys_user_profile p ON p.user_id = r.user_id WHERE sv.avgr <= 3.0 ORDER BY sv.avgr ASC, r.report_id ASC LIMIT 8
SELECT quality_issue AS factor, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_ai_report_quality WHERE quality_issue IS NOT NULL GROUP BY quality_issue ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT job_name AS jobName, competency_name AS competency, weight_percent AS weight, default_percent AS defaultWeight FROM sys_current_weights ORDER BY (job_name = '전체') DESC, job_name, default_percent DESC

SELECT version_code AS version, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS date, job_name AS jobName, change_reason AS reason, modifier_name AS modifier FROM sys_weights_history ORDER BY created_at DESC, history_id DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT prompt_code AS code, title AS title, version_code AS version, variables AS variables, prompt_content AS content FROM sys_prompt_template WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY prompt_code
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_current_weights SET weight_percent = #{weight} WHERE job_name = #{jobName} AND competency_name = #{competency}
mapper.select: SELECT version_code FROM sys_weights_history ORDER BY created_at DESC, history_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_weights_history (version_code, job_name, change_reason, modifier_name, weights_json) VALUES (#{version}, #{jobName}, #{reason}, #{modifier}, #{weightsJson})
